RemediationStrings.Title: NoDriveTypeAutoRun (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoDriveTypeAutoRun must be 255. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoWebServices (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoWebServices must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoAutorun (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoAutorun must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\AppPrivacy\LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoAutoplayfornonVolume (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\NoAutoplayfornonVolume must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableMotWOnInsecurePathCopy (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\DisableMotWOnInsecurePathCopy must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowGameDVR (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR\AllowGameDVR must be 0. Severity: Low. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: AlwaysInstallElevated (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer\AlwaysInstallElevated must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableUserControl (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer\EnableUserControl must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableScriptBlockLogging (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging\EnableScriptBlockLogging must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: **del.EnableScriptBlockInvocationLogging (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging\**del.EnableScriptBlockInvocationLogging must be . Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowWindowsInkWorkspace (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\WindowsInkWorkspace\AllowWindowsInkWorkspace must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.

RemediationStrings.Title: OnlyUseAXISForActiveXInstall (Application Control)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\AxInstaller\OnlyUseAXISForActiveXInstall must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Application Control.
